attributes.description: Traffic, latency, and error overview for Azure Application Gateway access logs.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"type":"markdown","embeddableConfig":{"content":"## [Azure Application Gateway OTel] Overview

Client-perceived traffic, latency, and error health from Application Gateway access logs.
- Request rate and traffic shape
- Client-facing status code distribution (2xx / 3xx / 4xx / 5xx)
- Gateway latency percentiles (p50 / p90 / p95 / p99)
- Top URL paths and top client IPs
- AGW reason-code (`error.type`)
